home.subtitle: Free writing multiverse
home.emptyTagline: Your first space is a blank one. Pick a template to get started, or start from nothing.
home.tagline: A clutter-free space for long-form writing — fiction, research, essays, journals.

about.title: about
about.paragraph1: This is for the writer who keeps starting over.  The one who opens a new document, types three sentences (or none), then spends 40mins  adjusting the font. The one whose best ideas arrive at 2am and get distracted. The one with fourteen tabs, six notebooks, and a draft that hasn't moved in a month.
about.paragraph2After: . I have ADHD, Autism, probably other -isms hasn't been diagnosed yet. I need something that understands my chaotic but wonderful brain. Somewhere to dump everything before it disappears (or start writing). The fragments, the half-thoughts, the 3am connections. All of it, in one place.
about.paragraph3: So I built this space for us. I hope it gives your dopamine rush just as much it give me to build this.
about.paragraph4Before: One more thing... I believe in tech for good & I hate advertsing. So, this will always be advert free and FREE for non-commercial use. You can fork it modify it as you like under
about.statusValueRest: — there is no data sync. All data is saved in IndexedDB in your local browser. If you clear your browser cache, your work will be lost.
about.feedbackBefore: I am still building this and I have alot ideas
about.feedbackAfter: . I'd love to hear what works, what doesn't, and what you wish existed. Feedback is welcome.

templates.syncTooltip: Cloud sync is unavailable — this app is local-only for now.
